description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, caches the global and project node_modules directories under the key 'deploy', and saves them as artifacts. In the before_script, run 'npm install -g phantomjs-prebuilt casperjs' then 'npm install'. In the script, execute 'node ./deploy.js'. The job should publish the /usr/local/lib/node_modules/ and node_modules/ directories as artifacts.
